isi.lyrics:
Lyric Sangha - 추신 (Moonlit Winter)

Romanization

jal innayo
geudongan gunggeumhaesseoyo
mutji mothan ambureul
dama boayo

ibeon gyeouren
mok kkeute nulleonoatdeon
maeumdeuri saeeona
chamji mothan geot gatayo

nuni narimyeon bukkeureoun jaugeul deopgo
saeroun heunjeogeul namgyeoyo

kkumeul kkumyeo jugobatdeon yaegil modu
hayan nun wie saegyeoyo

geudaeege
yonggireul nael su isseul geoya
daji mothan maeumeul
nune nallyeo bonaeyo

nuni narimyeon bukkeureoun jaugeul deopgo
saeroun heunjeogeul namgyeoyo

kkumeul kkumyeo jugobatdeon yaegil modu
hayan nun wie saegyeoyo

Hangeul

잘 있나요
그동안 궁금했어요
묻지 못한 안부를
담아 보아요

이번 겨울엔
목 끝에 눌러놓았던
마음들이 새어나
참지 못한 것 같아요

눈이 나리면 부끄러운 자욱을 덮고
새로운 흔적을 남겨요

꿈을 꾸며 주고받던 얘길 모두
하얀 눈 위에 새겨요

그대에게
용기를 낼 수 있을 거야
닿지 못한 마음을
눈에 날려 보내요

눈이 나리면 부끄러운 자욱을 덮고
새로운 흔적을 남겨요

꿈을 꾸며 주고받던 얘길 모두
하얀 눈 위에 새겨요

isi.lyrics:
Lyric entoy - Further (Feat. shaltt)

Romanization

See the distance of our love
Getting further everytime
Even though
You’re beside
By my side smiling
I can see your face
Pulling out made-up laughters
See the distance of our love
Getting further everytime
Even though
You’re beside
By my side smiling
I can feel your shake
Showing the end of our love

Just don’t wanna see you now
'Cause no words can control me
I feel nothing and you still don't realize
You still haven't seen the signs
What more can I give?

You’re so far
I don’t know how we can get closer
In your arms
I'm feeling off to someplace far

Even though
You’re beside

I can see your face
Pulling out made-up laughters

By my side smiling
I can feel your shake
